title: Property Executive (12-hours Night Shift)
description:
Job Description:

  • Provide facilities management services to our client's sites, managing camps that focus on Outdoor Adventures Activities. This includes scheduling preventative maintenance, pest control, horticulture, security management, etc. through our appointed term/ sub-contractors.
  • Investigate, check and analyze reported breakdowns & faults to determine their cause for the prevention of future occurrences.
  • Responsible for the coordination of meetings and events such as logistics support, obtaining quotations, raising of invoices etc.
  • Any other duties is assigned by the Supervisor.

Job Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma qualified preferably in Building/Mechanical/Electrical Engineering/Facilities Management with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.
  • Preferably possesses with Fire Safety Manager Certification.
  • Experience in Integrated Facilities Management/ M&E is preferred.
  • Having a Class 3 driving licenses will be an additional advantage.
  • Required to take 7 minutes ferry to work location from Punggol Point Jetty
  • Able to start work immediately or within short notice is an advantage.

As one of the key personnel maintaining the client’s facilities, we look forward to you being:

  • Committed to providing excellent service to our client.
  • Possess good communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Pro-active, independent, able to work with minimal supervision and perform under pressure.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office suite.


Employment Type: 2-years contract (renewable) with benefits

Work Schedule: Mondays - Sundays and Public Holidays, 12-hours night shift roster

Work Location: Northeast - Pulau Ubin, required to take 7 minutes ferry to work location from Punggol Point Jetty


We thank you for your interest in the above position and regret that only short-listed candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
As a leading facilities management company, CPG Facilities Management Pte Ltd (CPG FM) provides the full spectrum of facilities and estate management services, managing more than 1,000 buildings. Beyond the shores of Singapore, we are also recognised globally, securing several sizeable facilities management projects through joint efforts with our strategic partners in China, Macau and the Middle East. As we continue to build ourselves as a leading facilities management company, CPG FM will foster stronger synergistic partnership with our clients in developing customised solutions to improve efficiency, enhance service delivery and reduce their operating costs.

We credit our people for our successes. CPG FM focuses on embracing bright and dedicated individuals to provide value-added quality service and professional advice to our clients. We place great emphasis in offering a rewarding career for our people by developing them to their fullest potential. We provide in-house trainings and external career development programmes to allow our people to reach the highest standards of professionalism and personal competence.

If you have the drive and is self-motivated, we would like to hear from you. Find out more what are the positions available at CPG FM now.
postedCompany.name: CPG FACILITIES MANAGEMENT PTE LTD
